_note: Per-team squad player lists keyed by CANONICAL team name (wca.data.teamnames.canonical). Used ONLY to split the Odds API anytime/first-scorer player props (which carry no team tag) onto the correct side for the /next goalscorer block. Names are taken from the live 2026 World Cup player-prop markets / published squads; this file carries NO goal figures — every probability/odds shown in /next is pulled live from the Odds API and Polymarket at build time. Add a team's outfield/attacking players here when that fixture comes up; players not listed simply fall back to an 'unknown team' bucket and are still shown, just not attributed to a side.
